disableAutoUpdates.title: Disable Auto Updates
disableAutoUpdates.description: Disable automatic updates for Claude Desktop.

autoUpdaterEnforcementHours.title: Auto Update Enforcement Hours
autoUpdaterEnforcementHours.description: Hours before forcefully restarting Claude to apply a prepared update. Must be between 1 and 72 hours.

isDesktopExtensionEnabled.title: Enable Desktop Extensions
isDesktopExtensionEnabled.description: Enable or disable Claude Desktop extensions.

isDesktopExtensionDirectoryEnabled.title: Enable Extension Directory
isDesktopExtensionDirectoryEnabled.description: Enable or disable access to the extension directory.

isLocalDevMcpEnabled.title: Enable Local MCP Servers
isLocalDevMcpEnabled.description: Enable or disable local Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers.

isClaudeCodeForDesktopEnabled.title: Enable Claude Code for Desktop
isClaudeCodeForDesktopEnabled.description: Enable Claude code access in desktop.

isDesktopExtensionSignatureRequired.title: Require Signed Desktop Extensions
isDesktopExtensionSignatureRequired.description: When true, Claude Desktop rejects extensions that aren't signed by a trusted publisher.

items.title: Tool
items.description: Name of a built-in tool to disable.

disabledBuiltinTools.title: Disabled Built-in Tools
disabledBuiltinTools.description: Removes the listed built-in tools from the available set in Claude Desktop. Known tools: Task, Bash, Glob, Grep, Read, Edit, Write, NotebookEdit, WebFetch, TodoWrite, WebSearch, Skill, REPL, JavaScript, AskUserQuestion. ToolSearch and SendUserMessage are also available under specific conditions.

name.title: Name
name.description: Unique name identifying this MCP server.

url.title: URL
url.description: HTTPS URL of the remote MCP server.

transport.title: Transport
transport.description: Transport protocol used to reach the MCP server.

headers.title: Headers
headers.description: Static request headers used to authenticate to the MCP server (for example, Authorization). Mutually exclusive with the OAuth field.

oauth.title: OAuth
oauth.description: When true, Claude Desktop runs a PKCE OAuth flow at first use to acquire user credentials. Mutually exclusive with the Headers field.

toolPolicy.title: Tool Policy
toolPolicy.description: Maps tool names exposed by the MCP server to a policy. Allowed values per tool: allow, ask, blocked. The "ask" policy prompts the user to confirm before the tool runs.

managedMcpServers.title: Managed MCP Servers
managedMcpServers.description: Distributes remote MCP (Model Context Protocol) servers to users. Each entry requires a unique name and an HTTPS URL. Optional fields include transport, headers, OAuth, and tool-level policies. Used in Claude Cowork deployments on third-party platforms (Bedrock, Vertex AI, Azure AI Foundry, LLM gateways).
